description: A designed graphic showing a man with white-gray hair in a dark navy suit and red tie speaking at a lectern bearing the presidential seal, with a large American flag and a clear teleprompter panel behind him. Across the lower portion, the words 'Replacement Migration' appear struck through with a red line, and below in large white serif type is the word 'Remigration'. A small White House wordmark sits at the bottom center.
notable_text: Replacement Migration; Remigration; THE WHITE HOUSE
